texto: Just let go of the oars. Whenyou‘re no longer paddling against the Current, when you release your oars and relax into your ownnatural Well-Being, the Current, which is ever moving in the direction of that which you havebecome and all that you want, will carry you toward your desires.
autor: Let Your Feelings Be Your Guide by Esther and Jerry Hicks
explicacao: Citação de Let Your Feelings Be Your Guide by Esther and Jerry Hicks sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Just let go of the oars. Whenyou‘re no longer paddling against the Current, when you release your…” articula motivacao, dreams, law-of-attraction em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como law-of-attraction e power.
